me.kevinboone.jgemini - package me.kevinboone.jgemini
This is the base package for everything in the JGemini application.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.base - package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base
This package contains the interfaces that define the JGemini classes, along with some fundamental utilities for SSL, configuration management, and Filename processing.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.bundles - package me.kevinboone.jgemini.bundles
This package contains everything in JGemini that might need to be translated.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.converters - package me.kevinboone.jgemini.converters
This package contains the classes that convert various document types -- Gemtext, Gophermaps, etc -- into HTML, for rendering in the Swing document viewer.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.protocol - package me.kevinboone.jgemini.protocol
This package contains classes that handle the various network protocols that JGemini supports -- Gemini, Gopher, etc.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.ssl - package me.kevinboone.jgemini.ssl
Utility classes for handling identity and certificates.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing - package me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing
The Swing user interface for JGemini.
MediaSettingsPane - Class in me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing
